title: saussurea tianshuiensis var. tianshuiensis
intro: Saussurea tianshuiensis var. tianshuiensis, also known as Tianshui Saussurea or Qianhu, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Saussurea tianshuiensis var. tianshuiensis include relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. It is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and decoctions for its medicinal purposes, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
